category_sources: source_facts.description says Hamlib provides ham radio control libraries.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official hamlib.org site and source_facts.repo uses the Hamlib organization/name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki is the best dedicated documentation surface found; source_facts.homepage is the official project site fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ham radio control libraries; source_facts.executables lists rigctl and rotctl command-line tools.
